title: Fundamental Group Theory Concepts
description: A visual representation of the core algebraic structure of a group and its key properties, illustrating how elements relate under a binary operation.
relationships: Set G is closed under Binary Operation *
Identity Element e exists in G such that e*a = a*e = a
Every Element in G has an Inverse in G such that a*a⁻¹ = a⁻¹*a = e
